variants.description: Single LLM plan with no rewrite rounds; sandbox critic is used only for final validation.
variants.supported_claim: A single LLM plan can be normalized, semantically checked, sandboxed, and exported when accepted.
variants.claim_boundary: This variant does not test critic-driven rewriting because rewrite_rounds is zero.

variants.description: A first failed plan feeds critic feedback into a later rewrite attempt.
variants.supported_claim: The loop can run multiple attempts and inject critic feedback into a rewrite round.
variants.claim_boundary: If final_sandbox_status is not accept, this proves rewrite-loop mechanics, not successful recovery.

variants.description: Multiple LLM candidates are sandboxed and critic-ranked before selecting a validated plan.
variants.supported_claim: Multi-candidate search exposes more than one LLM plan to semantic validation, sandbox rollout, and critic ranking.
variants.claim_boundary: This is not a sequential rewrite loop unless a report contains multiple rewrite attempts.

variants.description: Memory-backed ranking exposes success/failure evidence and risk deltas that can be included in planner context.
variants.supported_claim: Failure/success memory affects candidate ranking evidence and can change selected candidates.
variants.claim_boundary: This report proves memory-aware ranking evidence, not a full LLM rewrite response to that evidence.

variants.description: Field-atomic writeback is reloaded as explicit parameter priors and trace summaries.
variants.supported_claim: Writeback can expose prior parameter ranges and execution-error summaries to later planner inputs.
variants.claim_boundary: Dry-run field_atomic ablation does not prove parameter improvement unless a real LLM changes parameters.

paper_wording.safe_claim: Existing reports support single-plan validation, multi-candidate critic ranking, memory-backed risk evidence, field-atomic parameter-prior exposure, and a dry-run sequential critic-feedback rewrite attempt.
paper_wording.avoid_claim: Do not claim critic-feedback rewriting improves recovery unless the underlying report has rewrite_rounds > 0 and final_sandbox_status=accept under a real LLM or clearly stated dry-run setting.
